A chrome extension to remind you to read your bookmarks

Read your bookmarks people ;)

Do you want to get reminded to read your bookmarks>
Are you spending excessive time on OTT platforms like Netflix and Prime? 
Are you watching too much of YouTube, maybe? 
Do you want to do something productive instead?

If the answer to any of the above is "YES", then "Bookmark Butler" can help you with that. This privacy-friendly productivity extension can help you focus on the things that matter and keep you accountable by reminding you to see the links that you feel are important.

Often, we forget to go through the links that we have bookmarked way back. Bookmark Butler will remind you to see those bookmarked links.

Here are a few ways it will help you:

> Reminds you to read any one random bookmark from your "See Later" bookmark folder everyday at a particular time
> Keeps track of the time you are spending on any of the flagged websites. You can decide which websites to flag.
> Shows a popup for the total daily time you are spending on the flagged websites.
> Notifies you every hour you spend on flagged websites to read any of of your bookmarked links if you are spending too much time on flagged websites.
> Lets you bookmark websites which you want to see later.


Future versions will include:

> Ability to add todo items to the extension on the go.
> Reminders about todo items
> More 'single click' interactions to simplify common workflows like snoozing a website reminder, moving the bookmarks to different folders.

Note: The extension is privacy-friendly. No data is collected from the user.

I'd love any feedback on this extension. For any feedback, please email sarthakguptapro[at]gmail[dot]com.
Searchery — Universal Search for Your Browser
Searchery — browser extension for instant search of the web, history and bookmarks using the Shift+Space hotkeys.

Searchery – Spotlight-Style Browser Search: Web, History & Bookmarks

⚡ Lightning-fast keyboard launcher for web, history, bookmarks, and tabs — with @-commands and instant engine switching.

Searchery is a free Chromium extension that pops up a compact command palette on any page. Search the web, your history and bookmarks, switch engines on the fly, and control tabs — all from the keyboard.

⚡ Why Searchery?
Stop clicking through menus and switching tabs. One hotkey summons a unified search that works across the web, your browsing data, and verticals — right where you are.

🌐 Core Features & Benefits

📍 Hotkeys
Open Searchery with Shift+Space (customizable: Alt+Space, Ctrl+Space, Ctrl+K, etc.).

📍 @-Commands
@this — search the current site
@find — instant on-page find and highlight
@images, @news, @videos, @maps — vertical search by category

📍 Search Engine Picker
Use the system default or switch between Google, Yandex, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Brave right in the popup.

📍 Smart Suggestions
Suggestions from your own query history for the last 90 days plus optional clipboard hints.

📍 Recent Tabs Carousel
Quickly flip through recently opened pages with icons, titles, and instant jump.

📍 Bookmark Search
Built-in viewer with instant filtering inside the popup.

📍 Tab Control
Enter — open or search
Shift+Enter — open in a new tab
Ctrl+Enter — keep focus on the current tab

📍 Themes
System, light, or dark. Smooth UI with keyword highlighting and autocomplete.

📍 New Tab Override
Optionally replace the browser’s New Tab page with your chosen engine’s home page.

📍 Privacy
Works locally, no registration, no third-party accounts.

💡 Who Searchery Is For

👨‍💻 Productivity power users and developers: a universal command line for your browser.
📈 Marketers and researchers: fast verticals and site-level searches on competitors.
🎓 Students and analysts: instant history recall, handy commands, and on-page find.
🏎️ Anyone who values speed: less mouse, more results.

🚀 Why Users Choose Searchery

✅ Instant access from one hotkey
✅ Unified interface for web, history, bookmarks, and tabs
✅ Flexible engine and vertical switching on the fly
✅ Local operation and no signup

🧩 How It Works

1️⃣ Press Shift+Space (or your custom hotkey)
2️⃣ Type a query or command (@this, @find, @images, etc.)
3️⃣ Pick a search engine — system, Google, Yandex, Bing, DuckDuckGo, or Brave
4️⃣ Use Arrow keys or Tab to accept suggestions and autocomplete
5️⃣ Press Enter to go; Shift+Enter opens in a new tab

💬 What Makes Searchery Unique

A Spotlight-style command palette for your browser that unifies web, history, and bookmark search with powerful @-commands for site-only and on-page search — all optimized for keyboard-first speed.

⚙️ Use Cases

🧭 Quick site-only search with @this
🖼️ Image, 📰 News, 🎬 Video, 🗺️ Maps verticals
✨ On-page find and highlight with @find
🔄 Jump back via the recent-tabs carousel
🔖 Instant bookmark access with live filtering

⭐ Get Started Now

Install Searchery, set your favorite hotkey, and turn your browser into a fast, universal command search with smart suggestions.

Opens new tabs next to the currently active tab for better workflow

Opens new tabs to the right of your active tab — not at the end. Keep workflows organized. Zero config. Lightweight.


## 🔧 How to use

1. Install the extension (Chrome/Chromium-based browsers).
2. Use your browser normally — press **Ctrl+T**, open links that create new tabs, or open bookmarks in new tabs. The extension will place the new tab next to the active one automatically.

## If `Ctrl+T` doesn't trigger the extension:
you may need to assign the keyboard shortcut to this extension.
Open `chrome://extensions/shortcuts` (or go to Menu ▸ More tools ▸ Extensions ▸ Keyboard shortcuts)
set the `Open Tab Next to Active` action to `Ctrl+T` (or another available shortcut).
Note that Chrome may reserve certain global shortcuts; if `Ctrl+T` is unavailable, choose a different shortcut.

> No additional configuration required (unless you need to assign the keyboard shortcut).

Below is a feature list for a browser extension that includes functionalities for managing and handling multiple tabs:

1. Clear…

Below is a feature list for a browser extension that includes functionalities for managing and handling multiple tabs:

1. Clear tab list: Provides a clear list of all open tabs, categorizing websites with the same domain name.

2. Search bar: Offers a search bar to quickly and accurately search for tabs, enabling fast access to desired webpages.

3. Bookmarking and syncing: Provides bookmarking and syncing functionality to save and sync your favorite webpages and bookmarks.

4. Tab editing: Allows editing operations on each tab or window, enabling quick deletion or bookmarking of a group or individual webpage.

5. Window renaming: Supports renaming different windows for better organization and classification of various window functionalities.

6. Right-click menu functionalities:
   - Add to "Read Later": Adds the current webpage to a "Read Later" list for convenient access when you have time, and allows marking the webpage as completed and removing it later.
   - Add to notepad: Adds selected keywords to a notepad for handling the content when you have time, and allows marking the webpage as completed and removing it later.

7. Custom webpage groups: Supports creating and naming webpage groups for specific scenarios, allowing one-click access to these predefined groups to meet specific browsing needs.

These functionalities aim to provide a more convenient and efficient tab management and browsing experience, helping you better organize Browser Window and Tab Management.


方便快捷的访问所有已打开的浏览器窗口和选项卡
使用登录功能，方便将您的收藏、记事本、稍后再看和自定义网页组的功能在不同设备中同步（我们不会将您的信息用在除此插件之外的功能）

如何使用Tabs Manager  && 功能列表:
~ 所有打开选项卡的清晰列表，并根据域名收纳了所有同域名网站，方便您更快捷地处理这些网页
~ 使用搜索栏快速准确的搜索选项卡
~ 对选项卡进行收藏同步书签（您也可以取消同步书签）
~ 每个选项卡或窗口都是n可编辑的，您可以快速删除或收藏一组/一个网页
~ 支持对不同窗口进行重命名，帮助您更好的整理不同窗口的功能分类
~ 右键菜单-“添加稍后再看”：将当前网页加入稍后再看，方便您在闲暇时访问这些网页，并且后续可以将网页状态勾选为已完成并删除它
~ 右键菜单-“添加记事本”：将网页中选中的关键词加入记事本，方便您闲暇时处理这些内容，并且后续可以将网页状态勾选为已完成并删除它
~ 自定义网页组：支持您增加特定场景的一组网页并命名保存，方便您在需要时或者打开浏览器一键打开这些网页组

Drop n Mark - Drag & Drop Bookmarker
Use drag and drop to create / delete bookmarks and folders.

Current methods of bookmarking suck, using this extension you will be bookmarking more frequently and your bookmarks will be better categorized thus easier to find; bookmarking will be effortless and no longer suck.

Drag n Drop works well when used along side other bookmark managers, where a bookmark manager will help you find and manage existing bookmarks and Drag n Drop will make bookmarking effortless.

Drag n Drop can be configured via options found when right clicking the extension when pinned. In options you can adjust where new bookmarks are saved, enable automatic deletion of duplicates and/or enable automatic organization of your files & folders.

Features:
- Drag & Drop to bookmark current page
- Drag & Drop to create new folder
- Automatic deletion of duplicate bookmarks
- Automatic organization of files & folders
- Works along side other bookmark managers 
- Does not suck

Help improve this extension by suggesting new features or reporting any bugs.
Chrome Spotlight-Tabs, Bookmarks, History and More
A Spotlight-like search tool for Chrome

Chrome Spotlight is a Spotlight-like search tool for Chrome that allows you to quickly search through your open tabs, bookmarks, and browsing history using an intuitive command palette. It is designed to enhance your browsing productivity and make navigation across your browsing data faster and more efficient.
Easily toggle the Spotlight interface using Ctrl+K (or Command+K on macOS).

🌍 Type translate [text] to get instant translations without leaving your current tab
🕒 Use time to check the current time in different time zones (great for remote teams!)
🤖 Type aichat to start chatting with AI models like OpenAI or Gemini directly in the popup
➗ Run quick math operations like 10+100*4 right from the search bar
Some other core features:
🔍 Unified search across tabs, bookmarks, and history
⌨️ Keyboard shortcut: Ctrl+K / Cmd+K to open anytime
🌐 Works seamlessly on all websites
⚙️ Customizable settings via the options page
Effortlessly manage and organize your web bookmarks efficiently.

Bookmark Master: Your Ultimate Bookmark Management Extension

Are you tired of cluttered bookmarks and broken links? Introducing Bookmark Master – the ultimate solution for organizing, editing, and managing your bookmarks effortlessly.

Features:

Create and Edit Bookmarks: Seamlessly create new bookmarks and edit existing ones with just a few clicks. Whether it's a webpage, article, or video, Bookmark Master helps you categorize and label your bookmarks for easy access.

Folder Management: Keep your bookmarks organized by creating custom folders and subfolders. With Bookmark Master, you can easily arrange your bookmarks based on topics, projects, or interests, making it simple to find what you need when you need it.

Scan for Inactive Bookmarks: Worried about outdated or broken links cluttering your bookmarks? Bookmark Master has you covered. Our advanced scanning feature automatically detects inactive bookmarks and provides options to remove or update them, ensuring your bookmark collection stays clean and functional.

Effortless Removal of Inactive Bookmarks: Say goodbye to clutter! Bookmark Master makes it easy to declutter your bookmarks by removing inactive links in just a few clicks. Keep your bookmark collection streamlined and up to date with minimal effort.

Why Choose Bookmark Master?

Simplicity: Our user-friendly interface makes bookmark management a breeze, even for beginners.
Efficiency: Save time and frustration with intuitive tools designed to streamline your bookmarking experience.
Organization: Say goodbye to chaos with customizable folders and efficient categorization options.
Reliability: Rest assured knowing that Bookmark Master keeps your bookmark collection clean and functional by identifying and removing inactive links.
Take control of your bookmarks today with Bookmark Master – the ultimate extension for efficient bookmark management. Download now and experience the difference!
The extension improves the browser's capabilities for working with bookmarks

The extension improves the browser's capabilities for working with bookmarks. 

* fast add bookmarks:
  * from selection in page.  
    Shortcut Ctrl+Shift+Period(dot) and context command.  
    Selection is used as folder name for new bookmark.  
    The extension is looking for folder (case and plural insensitive) or create new. 
  * from user input.  
    Shortcut Ctrl+Shift+Comma and context command.  
  * from last used list.  
    Last used list contains up to 50 last used folders.  
    Standard browser last used list contains only 5 items.  
    User can pin selected items in last used list.  
    User can delete bookmark using last used list. Click on tag second time.    
* extension shows existing bookmarks for active page in the right top corner.
* fast delete bookmark  
    Hover over bookmark and click small red button
* mark visited links in page
    turn on this option in settings 

Additional functionality for bookmarks
* User can hide bookmark labels by clicking on label.  
    To get access to buttons and links on the page under this labels
* Dated Bookmark Folders  
    Dated folders are folders that have "@D" at the end of their name.  
    When a user adds a bookmark to a dated folder "DONE @D", this extension replaces the @D with the actual date.  
    I use "DONE @D" to mark a list of news items or a list of author publications that I have finished  
    I use "Selected @D" to mark a page that I don't have time to rate right now.
* Option "Show author bookmarks with post bookmarks"  
    This feature implemented for dev.to, freecodecamp.org, linkedin.com, youtube.com and can be extended to other sites.
* Option 'Show bookmark title'.

Flat folder structure for bookmarks
The extension allows you to quickly switch to a flat folder structure for bookmarks.  
    The flat folder structure allows you to quickly find the desired folder since all  folders are on the first level and sorted.  
    In this mode on every browser start:  
       * folders with name starting with 'todo' are moved to root folder 'Bookmarks Toolbar'  
       * other folders are moved to root folder 'Other Bookmarks'  
       * nested folders are moved to root folder. Empty nested folders are deleted.  
       * folders are sorted  
       * folders with equal names (case and plural insensitive) are merged  
       * folders with not descriptive names (name starts with 'New folder', '[Folder Name]') are merged to 'Other bookmarks\zz-bookmark-info--unclassified'

Extra functionality  
* The extension clears url from search params on opening for defined sites.
* Command 'clear url from hash and all search params' in page context menu.
* Option 'Shows the previous visits'  
    User can distinguish between visited and new pages. New page don't have previous visits.
* Command 'Close duplicate tabs' in page context menu.
* Option 'Hide html-tags header, footer, aside, nav on printing.'.
* Option 'Hide page header for youtube channel'.

Bookmarkit makes bookmarking easier, faster, and smarter. With a simple right-click, you can save links, images, selected text, or the current page directly into a special “bookmarkit” folder on your bookmarks bar — all without opening new tabs.
Features
Right-click a link → save instantly without visiting


Right-click an image → save its URL


Right-click empty space → save the current page


Select text + right-click → bookmark the page with your selection highlighted


Automatically organizes everything in a “bookmarkit” folder


Who is it for?
Researchers & students – Save references, quotes, and related articles without losing focus


YouTube users – Collect multiple video links quickly while browsing search results, instead of opening each or building playlists


Casual readers – Save interesting blogs, articles, or images for later


Productivity seekers – Stay focused while queuing up resources


Stay organized, reduce tab clutter, and bookmark smarter.

Fast. Simple. Efficient.

A browser extension for efficient bookmark management with search capabilities

SearchMark helps you find, save, and manage bookmarks faster:

 • Save smarter - Find the right folder as you type and save in seconds
 • Explore your folders - Search folders by name and browse their contents with full-text search

** TabShelf** is a modern extension that revolutionizes Chrome tab management. Free yourself from memory shortages and the chaos of countless open tabs.

A modern tab management extension. Save, group, and search tabs to save browser resources and boost productivity. Supports Dark Mode.



* New Feature: "Save & Close" Option in Overlay Toolbar
    - Added a "Save & Close" checkbox to the page overlay toolbar. When enabled, saving the tab will automatically close it right after.

* New Feature: "SAVED" Status Indicator
    - Added a SAVED badge to the overlay toolbar if the current web page URL is already stored in your AllTabs view.
    - The save (heart) button is now grayed out and disabled for already saved tabs to proactively prevent duplicate saving.

* Bug Fixes & Improvements

    - Improved the app's startup behavior: It will no longer spawn duplicate AllTabs pages on startup and will simply focus on the existing tab if it's already open.
    - Fixed an issue where changing the viewing language within the Popup or AllTabs view didn't automatically sync onto the overlays embedded across different webpages. It now updates visually in real-time.
    - Pushed comprehensive internationalization (i18n) updates providing complete translations (EN, KO, JA, ZH-CN, ZH-TW) across all elements, including hover tooltips ("Switch to Auto Hide", "Always Show") on the overlay.
    - Fixed a UI styling inconsistency by adjusting the padding on the "Import Bookmarks" button to match the rest of the layout correctly.
FuzzSearch - All-in-One Search for Tabs, Bookmarks & Page Content
Fuzzy search for tabs, bookmarks, and page content. Press Ctrl+Shift+F to open.

FuzzSearch is a macOS Spotlight-style productivity tool for Chrome that brings lightning-fast, fuzzy search to your entire browsing experience. Stop hunting through hundreds of tabs or deep bookmark folders—find exactly what you need with just a few keystrokes.

Key Features:
🔍 Ultra-Fast Fuzzy Search: Powered by Fuse.js, our search is typo-tolerant and understands URL parameters (e.g., searching for "?id=123").

📄 Deep Page Content Search: Search for text, headings, and links on the current page. It even identifies hidden links that aren't immediately visible.

📑 Instant Tab Swapping: Jump between dozens of open tabs instantly.

⭐ Global Bookmarks & History: Unified access to your complete bookmark collection and recent history.

⌨️ Keyboard-Centric UX: Designed for power users. Navigate, select, and open results without ever touching your mouse. (Ctrl+Shift+F)

🌐 Privacy First: All searching and processing happen locally on your machine. We never collect or transmit your data.

changelog:
v1.0.1: 
[fix] intercept keydown in capture phase to prevent page auto-focus conflict
Instant browser history search. Local AI via Ollama: live synonym expansion, per-keyword cache. 100% private. Zero cloud.

SmrutiCortex — Your private, lightning-fast browser memory search engine.

Tired of losing important pages in your browser history? SmrutiCortex indexes everything you visit and retrieves any URL in milliseconds. Think "Everything" search for Windows, but for your browser.

KEY FEATURES:

⚡ Ultra-Fast Search — Results appear as you type (< 50ms)
🎯 Smart Ranking — Recent + frequent results with literal substring boost
🎯 Strict Matching — Only shows results containing your search terms (default ON, configurable)
🎲 Diverse Results — Filters duplicate URLs automatically for variety (default ON, configurable)
⭐ Bookmark Search — Search bookmarks alongside history with ★ indicator
🔍 Query Expansion — Find related terms with synonym matching
🖼️ Favicon Caching — Local cache for fast icon loading
📊 Performance Monitor — Real-time search metrics and timing
🔧 Advanced Diagnostics — Export system info for bug reports
🔐 100% Private — All data stays local in IndexedDB
🛡️ Self-Healing — Auto-recovery from errors with retry logic
🔧 Privacy Controls — Favicon toggle, sensitive-site blacklist
💾 Data Management — Storage quota monitoring, one-click rebuild
⌨️ Keyboard-First — Ctrl+Shift+S instant access, full arrow key navigation
🎨 Clean UI — Minimal, distraction-free interface
🤖 AI Search — Optional local keyword expansion (Ollama)
🌐 Cross-Browser — Works on Chrome, Edge, and Firefox
🎓 Guided Onboarding — In-extension spotlight tour for new users
🔘 Toggle Chip Bar — Quick-toggle settings without opening settings modal
🔔 Toast Notifications — Hover-to-pause, selectable text for error messages
🎨 Theme Support — Dark, Light, or Auto (follows system preference)
📦 Data Portability — Export/import your entire search index
⎋ Smart Escape — First Esc clears input, second Esc closes
🔄 Zero-Reload Updates — Keyboard shortcut survives extension updates
🎛️ Command Palette — Universal browser control with prefix modes (/, >, @, #, ??, ?)
🌍 Web Search — Search Google, YouTube, GitHub, and more from the palette
🪟 Browser Commands — 45+ tab/window management commands (opt-in)
🔖 Recently Closed — Find and restore recently closed tabs from tab switcher
🔍 Boundary-Flex Matching — finds `module42` inside `Module 42`, `Module-42`, `module_42` (clean exact matches still rank first)
⚡ Warm-Cache Popup — instant first paint with cached recent history

PRIVACY GUARANTEE:

• All data stored locally on your device
• No cloud sync, no external servers
• No analytics, no tracking
• Optional favicon loading (configurable)
• Sensitive-site blacklist (banks, password managers)
• Source-available — inspect the code anytime (BSL-1.1, converts to Apache-2.0 in 2030)
• You can delete all data anytime

HOW IT WORKS:

1. Install extension
2. Browse normally — SmrutiCortex indexes your history automatically
3. Press Ctrl+Shift+S (or click icon) to search
4. Type anything — title, URL, keywords
5. Hit Enter to open

KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS:

• Ctrl+Shift+S: Open search
• Enter: Open result
• Ctrl+Enter: Open in new tab
• Shift+Enter: Open in background tab
• Arrow keys: Navigate results
• Esc: Clear search (first press), close (second press)
• Type "sc " in address bar for quick access

PREFIX MODES (in quick-search overlay):

• / — Everyday commands (sort, theme, toggles)
• > — Power commands (tab management, groups)
• @ — Switch to tab by title + recently closed tabs
• # — Search bookmarks
• ?? — Web search (Google, YouTube, GitHub, etc.)
• ? — Help and discovery

TECHNICAL DETAILS:

• Manifest V3 (future-proof)
• IndexedDB for fast local storage
• Modular scoring algorithms for intelligent ranking
• Service worker background processing
• TypeScript codebase for reliability
• 2,397+ unit tests + 56 E2E tests, coverage ratchet gated in pre-commit

SOURCE-AVAILABLE (BSL-1.1):
View code, report issues: github.com/dhruvinrsoni/smruti-cortex
Free for personal use. Converts to Apache-2.0 on April 1, 2030.

New in v9.4.1 (from v9.3.0):

• Instant results after typing — keyword results now fire once after you pause typing (respects your Focus Delay setting), not on every individual keystroke

• Independent AI + Semantic chips — the 🧠 Semantic chip no longer requires the 🤖 AI chip to be on; each chip directly toggles its own setting

• Result list stays visible when toggling AI/Semantic chips; Ctrl+C on a result copies the URL


New in v9.3.0:
• Recent history is now live — new visits appear in the popup without clicking "Index Now"
• Report bad rankings directly from the popup (rate-limited to 5 per 24 h)
• Smarter deduplication removes near-duplicate results across sub-domains

New in v9.2.0

Boundary-flex search matching — module42 now finds Module 42, Module-42, module_42
Warm-cache popup — instant first paint with cached recent history
Idle-resume re-init — service worker wakes proactively, eliminating cold-start delay
Battery-aware keep-alive — adaptive cadence that respects laptop battery
Hardened Ollama integration — exponential backoff + model-name canonicalization
Opt-in Semantic toolbar chip + Report Chooser modal
2,397 unit tests across 70 files + 70+ E2E tests across 11 specs
Adds one new permission: idle — used solely to wake the service worker. Grants no access to browsing data.

Reviewer fast-path: No new permissions, no new host permissions, no new data collection vs v9.1.0. This release adds boundary-flex search matching, warm-cache popup paint, opt-in Semantic chip, and MV3 reliability hardening (idle re-init, battery-aware keep-alive). All processing remains local; all data remains in IndexedDB.

New in v9.4.0:
• Type "?? j PROJ-123" to jump straight to a Jira issue from the search bar
• Result list never blanks when toggling AI mode — instant display with chip pulse feedback
• Ctrl+C copies a paste-ready URL for the Chrome omnibox

New in v9.3.0:
• Recent history is now live — new visits appear in the popup without clicking "Index Now"
• Report bad rankings directly from the popup (rate-limited to 5 per 24 h)
• Smarter deduplication removes near-duplicate results across sub-domains

v9.2.0 — Reliability + smarter search.

NEW: Boundary-flex matching — `module42` matches `Module 42`, `Module-42`, `module_42`, etc.
NEW: Warm-cache recent history — popup paints instantly on open.
NEW: Opt-in Semantic toolbar chip; Report chooser modal.
FIX: Service worker re-inits on idle; battery-aware keep-alive.
FIX: Ollama backoff when offline; model-name canonicalization.
INFRA: Logging overhaul. Coverage gate.

No new permissions. 100% local.

New in v9.0.0 (vs v8.1.0) — LTS Release
New permissions:
- sessions (required) — for recently closed tab search and restore in the @ tab-switcher mode
- windows (required) — for focusing the correct window when switching tabs from search results, and for Move Tab / Merge Windows commands
- tabGroups (optional) — for tab group management commands in the command palette
- browsingData (optional) — for browsing data cleanup commands in the command palette
- topSites (optional) — for showing most-visited sites in the command palette


New features:
- Command palette with 6 prefix modes (/, >, @, #, ??, ?)
- 45+ advanced browser commands for tab/window management (opt-in, behind optional permissions)
- Recently closed tabs in tab-switcher mode (@) with one-click restore
- Web search mode for Google, YouTube, GitHub, GCP, Jira, Confluence
- Popup and quick-search overlay resizing with drag handles
- Unified scroll toggle
- Settings UI modernization (toggle switches, segmented controls, pill chips)

Bug fixes and stability:
- CSP compliance: moved inline error handler to external file
- Fixed message port closed warnings
- Fixed listener leaks in quick-search and tour
- Fixed unhandled promise rejections in resilience module
- Replaced 60+ silent catch blocks with meaningful logging
- Dead code removal (unused exports, imports, variables)
- Build guardrail for Chrome MV3 underscore-dir restriction

License change:
- Changed from Apache-2.0 to BSL-1.1 (source-available)
- Free for non-commercial, personal, educational, or evaluation use
- Converts to Apache-2.0 on April 1, 2030
The Game for your browser. Turn the internet into your gameboard, see browsing stats, and compete on the global high scores.

You've visited thousands of websites. What do you have to show for it?

Cheevos turns your daily browsing into a global competition. Every page you visit, file you download, and bookmark you save earns XP and unlocks achievements, building a rank that reflects how you actually use the internet.

Cheevos players have opened over 20,000 tabs and scrolled a combined 19 miles through the web. Every session adds to that.

Earn XP for what you already do
Every website visit, download, and bookmark counts. Watch your rank climb from Iron to Platinum as your real browsing habits are rewarded.

Unlock 100+ achievements across 10 categories
Navigation, Productivity, Time, Media, and more. Some achievements are obvious. Others are hidden: discover secret browser pages, rare milestones, and easter eggs most users never find.

Compete on global leaderboards
See where you rank against players worldwide. Live high scores update in real-time. Can you reach Diamond tier?

Browse with friends
Form a Party of up to 10 players, earn group XP, and compete in team challenges. Your squad's combined browsing builds a shared rank.

Works across Firefox and Chrome
Your XP, rank, and achievements sync across both browsers. Switch devices without losing your progress.

---
Privacy by Design — not just a tagline

All achievement logic runs entirely inside your browser. We never see your URLs, your history, or what you're reading. The only things that ever reach our servers are your XP total, your level, and your unlocked badge IDs — the minimum needed to power the leaderboard. Your raw browsing data stays on your machine, always.

You can delete your account and all synced data at any time from your dashboard.

---
Stop boring browsing. Install Cheevos and start playing the web.

---
Permissions — why we need them

We only request permissions that directly enable a specific feature. Here's exactly what each one does:

Browsing history and website activity
Required to detect achievement-triggering destinations — things like reaching a Wikipedia article, finding a hidden browser page, or completing a navigation milestone. We never store or sync your URLs. Instead, the extension creates a truncated one-way SHA-256 hash of each domain locally on your machine. The raw address is discarded immediately.

Bookmarks
Required for achievements tied to your curation habits — how many bookmarks you've saved, how long you've kept them, and how you organize them. Your folder names and URLs never leave your device.

Downloads
Required for achievements like Data Hoarder and Big Catch, which track cumulative download sizes and file counts. Filenames and URLs are processed locally and never synced.

Notifications
Used to announce achievement unlocks and major XP milestones in real-time. You can disable these in your browser's notification settings at any time.

---
That's it. No ad tracking, no behavioral profiling, no third-party data sharing. Just a game built on top of your existing browsing habits.
